beat.title: Into the Bolthole
beat.boundaryReason: The session opens with recap, exploration of the old pirate bolthole, and Acescale's initial scout of the cavern below. The beat ends once the party has actionable information about the undead shades and the layout.
dateEvidence: This continues immediately from the prior session's cliffhanger at the trapdoor beneath the master bedroom.
Later table talk places the descent and first fights around lunchtime on the same day.

beat.boundaryReason: After resting, the party opens the inner door, sneaks to the next chamber, meets Grimstone's human servant, and talks their way through a tense social scene instead of fighting. The beat ends after they search Arturo's belongings and regroup.

beat.title: Schemes and Guard Kill
beat.boundaryReason: The party debates how to reach Grimstone, attempts a bluff-based lure, then pivots to tricking and killing Arturo before pausing for a real-world break. The beat ends at the break boundary, which cleanly separates setup from the boss assault.
dateEvidence: Dialogue places the delve in the early afternoon by this point.
There is no in-world rest or overnight transition before the break.

beat.title: Aftermath in the Lab
beat.boundaryReason: After Grimstone dies, the party still has to finish the remaining spider swarm and stone wasp, rescue Acescale from repeated petrification, and sort Grimstone's potions and lab treasure. The beat ends once they decide to take another short rest before exploring the final rooms.
dateEvidence: The lab aftermath follows directly from the boss fight.
The party explicitly discusses taking a short rest in the same afternoon.

beat.title: Treasure and Dawn Escape
beat.boundaryReason: The party short rests, explores Grimstone's remaining chambers, recovers Dilion's real dog and treasure, avoids a mimic, then long rests and escapes at dawn before narrating epilogues. This beat spans the only true day transition in the session.
dateEvidence: The group discusses taking a short rest in the afternoon before checking the last rooms.
The transcript later states they 'find yourself early in the morning' while sneaking out.
The overnight rest advances the action into the next day.
